feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Ghost and Impulse
entry.summary:
Author: shallythunder

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,615Chapters: 6/27Kudos: 6

Summary: After Buck gets hit by the lightning strike, he develops superpowers—a searing lightning bolt and the ability to fly. As he learns about his powers, and finds out Eddie has them too, they recruit Hen as their mentor, all while an honest-to-goodness supervillain blasts into town and threatens to shut off the city’s water supply in a desperate attempt to win back the attention of the President. Can Buck, who’s dedicated his life to saving people, actually hurt someone, even if he is a villain?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

Author: edmundodiazjr

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 446Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: He slowly entered the dark room, tiptoeing until he reaches the queen-sized bed. The camera wobbled as Christopher climbed up it, being very careful not to wake the two.And then he launches—“YAH!”Buck jolts upright as the camera hits him square on the forehead. “Ow…!”The camera shakes wildly.Eddie groaned, blinking awake as he rubs his eyes. He squints at Christopher, his gaze somewhere between annoyance and confusion.“Iiiiiiiit’s CHRISTMAAAS!” Christopher said excitedly, while pointing the camera to his dad, zooming in and out dramatically.OR; It’s Christmas, and Christopher finds the camera and films them waking up. (TJIS IS AN AU WHERE THEY ARE CANON IN 2023 and they have a cam)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,309Chapters: 9/11Kudos: 117

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,797Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 10

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,507Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 215

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Look at you go, crossin' state lines with your shadow
entry.summary:
Author: Sam_Stew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,941Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Buck glances down again, seeing yet again another unknown unknown number calling him, "I'll be right back," he explains, jutting his thumb back before rushing towards the bunk rooms to answer the call. "Is this Evan Buckley?" "Yes, this is he, are you the lawyer I was told was calling about last night?" "Yes, now I am not the last person you will here with about this part of the will," he explains, "and you can wave your rights to Theo-" "Theo?" Buck asks "Yes, Theo Spencer he's left in your care in case of accident," – Or after Eddie leaves LA Buck gets a call from a lawyer - Aka Buck gets Theo a season early, Eddie’s in Texas and doesn’t want to be, Chris is the first to realize they're a family, Bobby lives, and somehow Athena still ends up in space, (8B and S9 with Bobby and Theo)

entry.title: the one gayteen
entry.summary:
Author: sapphicsparrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,987Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 90

Summary: Chimney: You're not helping his gay allegations. Buck: tf have i done???also it's just you thinking that Chimney: We both know that's not true. Buck: ok well you're all wrong Chimney: Probably. Probably not. Buck: why do you, as a self proclaimed straight man, have gaydar Chimney: You've got a point.Text conversations between the 118 & Co.

entry.title: a Philly cheesesteak wit or witout
entry.summary:
Author: Wordsarefleeting

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,263Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: “Surprise.” Bobby says, setting down a platter of sandwiches on the table. So not stir fry or fajitas. “Eddie said he heard you missed Philly cheesesteaks.”   Or Eddie gets Bobby to make Philly cheesesteaks as a surprise for Buck, but it doesn't go as planned.

entry.title: Tower Made of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: Brixon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 292,700Chapters: 28/32Kudos: 296

Summary: Prince Evan, affectionately known as Buck, is the heir his parents never wanted. He’s abandoned all royal duties in favor of throwing outlandish parties and expensive vacations. Unfortunately, after his father steps down, Buck has to fulfill two of his most hated royal duties — kingship and marriage. OR: When Buck meets Eddie, he decides the surest way to anger his parents and the council is to marry a kitchen cook. When Eddie meets Prince Evan, he wants to know whether it would be considered treason to push a prince off of the nearest cliff.

entry.title: You're a running car, I'm a closed garage.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,316Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 50

Summary: Dear Eddie,You probably have a lot of questions. I’ll get to answering them later. But first, let me paint you a picture.Imagine a little child, growing up in the depths of suburban Pennsylvania. They have no real friends, only their older sister. They have plenty of toys that were once said sister’s, including a collection of Barbies.Among these Barbies is a singular Ken. The child pays special attention to him. While their parents are wondering why the child isn’t obsessed with changing the Barbies into a thousand and one dresses, they take a pink marker and draw a birthmark on the side of Ken’s left eye. They keep Ken hidden from everyone else and only bring him out when no one’s around, to look at him long and hard, mesmerized.If you haven’t guessed yet, I am that child. ____OR Buck just wants to finally have an established partner in field at the 118. He doesn't expect the new hire to be the guy he'd dated back in college, before he dropped out and came out.

entry.title: Secrets Beyond the Crash
entry.summary:
Author: EmToGo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,321Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 34

Summary: After Eddie’s car is found wrecked on the side of the road, he disappears without a trace. No body. No clues. No explanation. The investigation begins. Buck can’t stay out of it. Because this wasn’t just an accident... and the truth lies somewhere beyond the mystery.

entry.title: Karma.
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,101Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 108

Summary: Buck’s voice cuts gently through the silence. “Seriously, man. You okay?” Eddie swallows. The honest answer feels lodged somewhere behind his ribs, terrifying and enormous. No, actually. I think I’m in love with you and it’s ruining my entire life. Instead he says, “Just thinking.”

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,043Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 349

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet. While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead. Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

entry.title: eddie diaz's 15 step guide to scoring a husband
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,031Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 169

Summary: He laid back down, staring up at the ceiling again. When he couldn’t fall asleep, he usually tried some 4-7-8 counting method that he learned ages ago. It often did the trick in a matter of minutes, 15 at most.This was not one of those nights.No matter what he did, how much he tossed and turned, he couldn’t stop his brain from thinking and overanalyzing.What did they mean by that? ‘Just made sense,’ we don’t do everything together, we’re not—Eddie shot up mid-thought.“Oh. Oh god,” he said to no one. ... some old family book inspires eddie to make a guide for getting his man.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 154,069Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 100

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.
